[DQC.US.0005.49] The date of 2025-05-09 used for Issuance of common stock for services and the Scenario [Axis] and srt:ScenarioForecastMember with a value of 1 is earlier than or the same as the reporting period end date of 2025-06-30. Either remove the statement scenario axis and forecast member from this value, change the end date for the value or update the Document and Entity Information document period end date.
The properties of this us-gaap:StockIssuedDuringPeriodValueIssuedForServices fact are: Period: 2025-05-08 to 2025-05-09 Dimensions: us-gaap:DebtInstrumentAxis=GNVR:BrentLilienthalMember, srt:StatementScenarioAxis=srt:ScenarioForecastMember Unit: USD Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - f2sh_10k.htm 5705
